title: Alatiliparis angustiflora
taxonomy: Alatiliparis angustiflora is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It is a type of orchid native to New Caledonia. Alatiliparis angustiflora is placed in the genus Alatiliparis and is closely related to other orchid species within the same family. The classification of Alatiliparis angustiflora is based on its unique characteristics and genetic makeup. Further research is needed to fully understand the evolutionary relationships within the genus Alatiliparis.
uses: Alatiliparis angustiflora, a species of orchid found in New Caledonia, is reported to have potential medicinal uses. Although research on the plant is limited, it is believed to have anti-inflammatory properties. Traditional healers in New Caledonia use the plant to treat various ailments, including fever and respiratory issues.
